title: campanula rotundifolia subsp. albanica
intro: Campanula rotundifolia subsp. albanica, also known as the Albanian bellflower, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the bellflower family Campanulaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Campanula rotundifolia subsp. albanica include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and exhibiting antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves or flowers in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
